授業方法: Centered mainly on Lectures followed by discussion. Dedicated seminar class will be held on session 7 and 14 to facilitate in-depth analysis and student participation.

第1回: Session 1) 【Startup Week】Online Class (On-demand format)《60 Minutes》 Orientation, Introductory Reading and Online Quiz
第2回: Session 2) 【Core Week 1】 Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Course Introduction, Why Japan?  (Discussion)
第3回: Session 3) 【Core Week 2】 Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Early Unification and Tokugawa Order (Lecture followed by discussion)
第4回: Session 4) 【Core Week 3】  Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Meiji Restoration to 1940 System  (Lecture followed by discussion)
第5回: Session 5) 【Core Week 4】 Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Theoretical Paradigm and the Postwar Settlement  (Lecture followed by discussion)
第6回: Session 6) 【Core Week 5】 Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》US-Japan Security Alliance (Lecture followed by discussion)
第7回: Session 7) 【Core Week 6】 Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》National Security Strategy 2022 (Seminar)
第8回: Session 8) 【Core Week 7】 Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Strategic Engagement in the Indo-Pacific (Lecture followed by discussion)
第9回: Session 9) 【Core Week 8】 Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Burden of History: Japan-China Relations (Lecture followed by discussion)
第10回: Session 10) 【Core Week 9 】Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Burden of History: Japan-Korean Peninsula Relations (Lecture followed by discussion)
第11回: Session 11) 【Core Week 10】 Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Economic Growth: Approach to International Cooperation (Lecture followed by discussion)
第12回: Session 12) 【Flex Hours】[DATE TO BE DECIDED]Face-to-face class《120 Minutes》G7 + Outreach Partner from Global South (India, Brazil, Indonesia) Kobe Summit (Simulation Activity) Student divided into teams representing the G7 nation and outreach partners from Global South must decide on a coordinated response to an international crisis.
第13回: Session 13)  【Core Week 11】Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Contemporary Realities: Japan's Choice (Lecture followed by discussion)
第14回: Session 14)  【Core Week 12】Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Soft Power, Cultural Diplomacy and the Future (Seminar)
第15回: Session 15) 【Flex Hours】 Online class (On-demand format)《90 Minutes》feedback session
トピック.授業外学習2: Students will be required to read the essential readings that will be shared a week prior to designated class. Preparation for simulation exercise.

教科書/Required texts0:
Japan Rising: The Resurgence of japanese Power and Purpose, Kenneth Pyle, Public Affairs, 2007Japan, Jeff Kingston, Newark, 2019
Japan and the Wider World: From the Mid-Nineteenth Century to Present, Akira Iriye, Routledge, 2014The Political History of Modern Japan: Foreign Relations and Domestic Poliics, Kitaoka Shinichi, Routledge, 2018
Japan's International Relations: Politics, Economics and Security, Glenn D. Hook et.al, Routledge, 2011
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: Reflection paper collected periodically from students
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.

成績評価Grading2: 備考　Note Class engagement and quality of contribution: 20%MCQ format mid term quiz: 20% (Session 13 - 20 minutes 20 questions)Simulation exercise in Flex Hours: 20%Final in-calss exam: 40%
